tooltip.gutenbergpress.gutenberg_press: Places an oversized educational multiblock press. Needs an 11 x 9 x 9 clear area.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.printing_drawer: The sliding bed that carries type and paper under the platen.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.press_screw: The pressure mechanism that lowers the platen onto the paper.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.wooden_frame_part: A structural part for the Renaissance wooden press frame.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.type_composition: Raised movable type arranged for one print.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.ink_roller: Right-click the loaded press to spread ink over the type.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.printing_ink: Right-click the loaded press to ink the movable type.
tooltip.gutenbergpress.blank_paper_sheet: Place this on the inked type bed before pressing.
message.gutenbergpress.structure_blocked: The oversized press needs an 11 x 9 x 9 clear area.
message.gutenbergpress.master_missing: This press part has lost its master block.
message.gutenbergpress.need_type: Insert a movable type composition first.
message.gutenbergpress.need_ink: Apply ink with Printing Ink or an Ink Roller.
message.gutenbergpress.inked: The movable type has been inked.
message.gutenbergpress.need_paper: Place a blank paper sheet on the printing bed.
message.gutenbergpress.paper_placed: Paper has been placed on the printing bed.
message.gutenbergpress.use_empty_hand_dr: Use an empty hand to push the drawer into the press.
message.gutenbergpress.drawer_inserted: The drawer has been pushed under the platen.
message.gutenbergpress.use_empty_hand_sc: Use an empty hand to tighten the pressure screw.
message.gutenbergpress.press_ready: The screw is tightened. The press is ready to stamp.
message.gutenbergpress.use_empty_hand_pr: Use an empty hand to start pressing.
message.gutenbergpress.pressing: The screw press applies pressure to transfer ink onto paper.
message.gutenbergpress.wait_for_press: The platen is still pressing the sheet.
message.gutenbergpress.use_empty_hand_re: Use an empty hand to remove the printed paper.
